parsed_json.reasoning: The invoice payment for Redwood Data Partners is for the July platform fee and a Q2 pipeline attribution true-up. The true-up amount is calculated based on the Q2 2026 Pipeline Attribution Report, which shows qualified spend of $2,000,000, exceeding the $800,000 threshold in Amendment 2 of the SOW. The calculated true-up of $87,600 (7.3% of $1,200,000) is consistent with the contract terms and the reported spend. An internal email also confirms that the true-up is expected and the VP of Revenue Operations will review it.
